title: Fatigue and Weight Gain - Hypothyroidism
chief_complaint: Progressive fatigue, weight gain (8 kg in 6 months), cold intolerance, constipation, and dry skin.

physical_exam.general: Dry coarse skin, periorbital puffiness, delayed relaxation of deep tendon reflexes

patient_responses.fatigue: I'm exhausted all the time, even after sleeping
patient_responses.cold: I feel cold when others are comfortable
patient_responses.weight: I'm gaining weight despite eating less

feedback.correct_message: Well diagnosed! Primary hypothyroidism from Hashimoto thyroiditis.
feedback.incorrect_message: This is Hashimoto hypothyroidism. The elevated TSH, low T4, and positive antibodies are diagnostic.
feedback.attending_note: Hashimoto hypothyroidism: Levothyroxine 1.6 mcg/kg/day, take on empty stomach, recheck TSH in 6-8 weeks. Goal TSH: 0.5-2.5. Check lipids - may improve with treatment.
